summary: Soundboard recording with noticeable speed fluctuations and out‑of‑tune guitars, but the show delivers a decent first set and a highlight‑filled second set featuring Candyman, Rider and a strong Jordan.
review: The SBD capture suffers from pitch wobble, occasional tape wow and guitars that drift out of tune, making the listening experience uneven. Musically the concert is an average‑to‑above‑average spring ’70 performance; the short first set holds its own while the sprawling second set shines on Candyman, Rider and a memorable Jordan jam.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer gives a perfect 5‑star rave while the other rates it 3 stars due to technical flaws and only modest musical excitement; averaging these with weighting toward show quality yields a solid but not outstanding rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: SBD has speed/pitch fluctuations, noticeable guitar tuning problems, occasional tape wow (e.g., Not Fade Away), a reel‑change cut in Schoolgirl and several tracks requiring pitch correction.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A brief, five‑song first set followed by a 2‑hour, 17‑song second set; pacing is uneven due to technical hiccups but the second half builds momentum with strong jams.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Shows some great slide work on Speedway, but overall guitars (including his) wander out of tune.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey does not play in the acoustic set, alternating with Billy during that portion.
